What changed
Add a PR template, a personal self-review checklist, and updated the README with a "How to Run" section.
Created the files:

- .github/pull_request_template.md
- docs/pr-checklist.md
- README.md (added How to run section)
Why
To improve PR hygiene and make it easier for reviewers to understand changes.
The self-review checklist ensures all important steps are checked before opening a PR.
to make it more clear and understandable.

How to test
1- Verify that .github/pull_request_template.md exists and contains the required sections and checklist.
2- Verify that docs/pr-checklist.md exists and contains at least 5 checklist items.
3- Open README.md and check that it includes the How to run section.
4- Optionally, follow the How to run steps to confirm the project runs correctly.
Checklist
-[ yes] Code runs without errors
-[ yes] No debug statements remain
-[ yes] README updated if necessary
-[ yes] This PR has one clear purpose
